summary: Backend-only verification passed for execution/trade summary baseline: submitted, partially filled, filled, canceled, and failed paths are persisted and logged; final trade outcome is written only when position is CLOSED. Runtime regression and worker timeout probes also passed. Exchange flows in probes are MOCKED; Telegram delivery is NOT validated end-to-end (as requested).
action_items: Keep execution_summary_failed_probe in CI to guard FAILED summary contract for BUY/SELL live error paths.
Keep distinguishing OPTIMISTIC_LIVE vs CONFIRMED_LIVE based on reconciliation detail availability (trade stats/fees).
critical_code_review_comments: executionEngine.ts remains oversized (>700 lines) and mixes execution, reconciliation, and summary side-effects; split to reduce regression risk.
seed_data_creation: No persistent seed data. Isolated DATA_DIR under /tmp used for each probe run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Executed and passed: yarn lint; yarn build; TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN=testtoken TELEGRAM_ALLOWED_USER_IDS=1 DATA_DIR=/tmp/mafiamarkets-it6-reg LOG_DIR=/tmp/mafiamarkets-it6-reg/logs TEMP_DIR=/tmp/mafiamarkets-it6-reg/tmp yarn tsx /app/tests/runtime_backend_regression.ts; TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN=testtoken TELEGRAM_ALLOWED_USER_IDS=1 DATA_DIR=/tmp/mafiamarkets-it6-live LOG_DIR=/tmp/mafiamarkets-it6-live/logs TEMP_DIR=/tmp/mafiamarkets-it6-live/tmp yarn tsx /app/tests/live_execution_hardening_probe.ts; TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN=testtoken TELEGRAM_ALLOWED_USER_IDS=1 DATA_DIR=/tmp/mafiamarkets-it6-timeout LOG_DIR=/tmp/mafiamarkets-it6-timeout/logs TEMP_DIR=/tmp/mafiamarkets-it6-timeout/tmp yarn tsx /app/tests/worker_timeout_probe.ts; TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN=testtoken TELEGRAM_ALLOWED_USER_IDS=1 DATA_DIR=/tmp/mafiamarkets-it6-failed LOG_DIR=/tmp/mafiamarkets-it6-failed/logs TEMP_DIR=/tmp/mafiamarkets-it6-failed/tmp yarn tsx /app/tests/execution_summary_failed_probe.ts. MOCKED APIs: FakeLiveIndodaxClient/FakeLiveOrderApi/FakeIndodaxClient. Telegram live delivery not validated.
rca of the issue: No failing regression reproduced in this iteration. New probe confirms failure path behavior: when live trade submission throws, OrderManager marks REJECTED and SummaryService persists FAILED with CONFIRMED_LIVE; trade outcome summary is not emitted unless position status is CLOSED.
